corrections.text: Five of the seven cited sources (officechai.com, asanify.com, therundown.ai, edtechinnovationhub.com, eu.36kr.com) are not on the publication's verified source allowlist. All core factual claims in the article are confirmed by the primary arXiv source (arxiv.org/abs/2605.06651). The leaderboard competitor scores attributed to OfficeChai (GPT-5.5 Pro at 39.6%, Claude Opus 4.7 at 22.9%) are sourced from a leaderboard image described in that outlet's coverage and are not independently verifiable from the arXiv paper itself, which does not name these competitor results. Readers seeking primary sourcing for the competitor scores should consult the Epoch AI FrontierMath leaderboard directly at epoch.ai/frontiermath.
